watchlistPinningBehavior: Any number of starred symbols are pinned to the top of Dashboard, Dashboard Watchlist tab, Technical Scanner, Watchlist page, and within Trade Opportunity sections when present.
peRatioSource: Screener reference snapshot stored in PE_RATIOS map; N/A when company P/E is not meaningful/available
latestPriceRefreshNote: Embedded snapshot refreshed from Yahoo chart endpoint; run npm run serve:live for continuous refresh while market is open.
frontendFreeLiveDataSource: Yahoo chart endpoint via direct browser fetch with CORS proxy fallbacks; not exchange-certified
frontendSecondarySource: Yahoo chart endpoint through CORS fallback proxies
latestFrontendTest: PASS - Moneycontrol frontend refresh returned 65 fresh records, old snapshot fills remaining indices
overlapProtection: PASS - next tick skipped while previous free-feed request is still in flight
tablePageRows: NIFTY 50 option chain parsed from Groww public option-chain page
liveDataNotCopied: PASS - values come from parsed option-chain payload / live calculations, not screenshot data
tableFirstPaintDataVisible: PASS - embedded Groww NIFTY option snapshot renders immediately; live refresh runs in background
watchlistEmptyFix: PASS - Watchlist page now shows starter live symbols even when local storage is empty
lagFixDetails: NIFTY option-chain refresh only runs when Table route is active
Full 63-stock technical analysis is throttled to 5 seconds instead of every 1-second tick
Option analytics is throttled to 2.5 seconds
Scanner page calculations are cached for 5 seconds
Rendering is requestAnimationFrame-scheduled and skipped for hidden tabs
1-second price-refresh scheduler remains enabled with overlap protection
priceRefreshOnly: PASS - provider updates state every second; visible price cells are patched in place without rebuilding the entire page
fullRenderPolicy: Initial load and user navigation/actions only; live ticks patch existing DOM nodes
pcrStandaloneSignalWarning: PASS - PCR table shows bias only; BUY/SELL still comes from multi-indicator signal table
officialLiveRequirement: Use Render backend with UPSTOX_ACCESS_TOKEN for correct official live data
marketClosedBehavior: Shows Market Closed and last available data outside 09:00-15:00 IST
optionsPages: Options Intelligence: overview, PCR/VWAP metrics, combined output, NIFTY50 stock options universe
Options Chain: detailed CALL/PUT tables and PCR+VWAP signal history
sidebarToggleBehavior: Arrow button hides/unhides the left sidebar and persists state locally.
aiPageLayout: Screenshot-style market strip, KPI cards, Intraday Buy/Sell and Options Buy/Sell sections
aiIndicatorRule: Shows trades only when at least 7 of 10 core indicators agree
aiPriceData: Uses active live/delayed provider snapshot; official live requires Render + Upstox
aiTargetsStops: Entry, stop loss and targets use existing ATR/support/resistance risk engine
buySellZonesTimeframes: Recalculates for selected stock timeframe using live price, ATR, VWAP, support/resistance and volatility
optionsAIContractFormat: Underlying Strike CE/PE without comma, e.g. RELIANCE 1300 CE, HDFCBANK 825 PE, NIFTY 24200 CE
optionsAIImmediateRecalculate: PASS - selecting stock forces options recalculation instead of waiting for throttle
selectChangeHandler: PASS - select supports both input and change events
optionsAIBestChoiceRule: Ranks BUY CE, BUY PE, SELL CE, SELL PE and highlights one AI BEST CHOICE
optionsAITechnicalInputs: All 20 indicators are counted for selected stock/index before ranking strategies
optionsAIFlowMetrics: Shows PCR, Total Call OI Change, Total Put OI Change above strategy cards
optionsAIAllStocksVerified: PASS - exact CE/PE labels and best-choice logic checked for all NIFTY 50 stocks
